# Hillview – Copilot Coding Agent Instructions

The authoritative developer documentation for this repository lives in the CLAUDE.md files.
**Read these files before making any changes:**

- [`CLAUDE.md`](../CLAUDE.md) – top-level overview: project structure, quick-start commands, architecture, coding guidelines
- [`backend/CLAUDE.md`](../backend/CLAUDE.md) – backend commands, API architecture, database migrations, testing strategy
- [`frontend/CLAUDE.md`](../frontend/CLAUDE.md) – frontend/Android commands, test configuration, build scripts
